Job Title: Data Analyst II
Company: MegaRetail Inc.
Department: Business Intelligence
Location: Chicago, IL (On-site)

Position Summary:
The Data Analyst II will support the BI team in developing dashboards, reports, and ad-hoc analyses to support business decisions across merchandising and supply chain.

Minimum Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science or related field
• 2-4 years of experience in a data analysis role

• Proficiency in Excel including pivot tables and VLOOKUP

raw_text: hiring a security engineer. fully remote. $160-190k. need someone who knows cloud security (AWS/GCP), has done pen testing, and understands compliance frameworks (SOC2, ISO 27001). must be US citizen due to client requirements. 4+ years exp. we're a 30-person cybersecurity consultancy. good vibes. apply: careers@cyberguard.io

POSITION: Lead Android Developer
COMPANY: StreamMedia Entertainment
LOCATION: Los Angeles, California
TYPE: Full-Time
SALARY RANGE: $155,000.00 - $195,000.00 per year
DEPARTMENT: Mobile Engineering

SUMMARY OF POSITION:
The Lead Android Developer will be responsible for architecting and developing our flagship streaming application used by 5M+ subscribers. The ideal candidate has deep Android expertise and experience leading a team of mobile developers.

ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES:
1. Lead a team of 5 Android developers
2. Architect the next generation of our Android application using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose
3. Ensure app performance, quality, and responsiveness
4. Collaborate with iOS team to maintain feature parity
5. Participate in code reviews and mentor junior developers

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS:
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience
- 6+ years of Android development
- Expert knowledge of Kotlin
- Experience with Jetpack Compose
- Team leadership experience
- Published apps on Google Play Store

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS:
- Experience with video streaming/media playback (ExoPlayer)
- DRM implementation experience
- Cross-platform development exposure (KMP)

BENEFITS:
- Comprehensive health insurance
- Free streaming subscription
- 4 weeks PTO + holidays
- Annual bonus (10-15%)
- Professional development budget
- Gym membership reimbursement

ground_truth.title: Lead Android Developer
requirements: Bachelor's degree in CS or equivalent
Published apps on Google Play Store

Rocketship Analytics is a YC-backed (W24) startup building the next generation of real-time analytics for e-commerce. We raised $12M Series A.

Tech stack: Kafka, Flink, ClickHouse, dbt, Python, Terraform

What we need:
Someone who has built and operated data pipelines at scale. You should be comfortable with streaming architectures and batch processing. Experience with data modeling and warehouse design is essential.

SaaSly | Remote, EST hours | $90K-$110K OTE (70/30 split)

Manage a portfolio of 40-50 mid-market accounts. Drive adoption, retention, and expansion. You'll own the full post-sales lifecycle from onboarding to renewal.

Benefits: health/dental/vision, 401k, unlimited PTO (we actually use it), annual learning stipend

Embedded Systems Engineer
AeroSense Robotics | Boulder, CO (On-site required — hardware lab access needed)

We build autonomous drones for agricultural monitoring. Our engineering team is 15 people.

Looking for an embedded engineer to work on flight controller firmware and sensor integration.

Must have:
• C/C++ on bare metal and RTOS (FreeRTOS preferred)
• Experience with ARM Cortex-M processors
• Hardware debugging (oscilloscope, logic analyzer, JTAG)
• Understanding of control systems and signal processing
• US Person status required (ITAR)

Nice to have:
• Drone/UAV industry experience
• ROS2 familiarity
• PCB design basics

Pay: $120,000 - $150,000 + equity
Benefits: Health, dental, vision, outdoor recreation stipend, dog-friendly office

MACHINE LEARNING INFRASTRUCTURE ENGINEER

Company Confidential — Top 10 Tech Company

Level: Senior/Staff (L5-L6 equivalent)
Comp: $280K-$400K total (base + bonus + RSUs)
Locations: Menlo Park, CA | Seattle, WA | NYC

We're looking for an ML Infrastructure Engineer to build the platform that trains and serves our foundation models. You'll work at the intersection of distributed systems and machine learning.

You bring:
- MS/PhD in CS or related field, or equivalent experience
- 5+ years building ML infrastructure
- Expert in at least one: PyTorch internals, CUDA, distributed training (FSDP/DeepSpeed/Megatron)
- Experience with large-scale GPU clusters (1000+ GPUs)
- Systems programming skills (C++, Rust, or Go)
- Published work or patents in ML systems is a plus

This is a high-impact role with direct visibility to leadership.
